meaning: adj.四季不断的,终年的,长期的,永久的,(植物)多年生的
examples: The perennial vegetation adjusts to the aridity by means of various avoidance mechanisms.
We learned that the Botai were able to build large perennial villages, sometimes with hundreds of homes.
The perennial appeal of its literary and social aspects has delighted readers since its first appearance.
As a perennial warning against the abuse of government power, that story has merit.
